dismissalText.commentary: Will Jacks c Ghosh b Kamboj 1 (5b 0x4 0x6 6m) SR: 20

dismissalComment.html: Absolute stunner from Ramakrishna! This was on a length and outside off. Jacks, looking to force the issue, runs down and hoicks a lofted drive in the air. Grabs the bottom edge of the bat and it flies towards deep point. Ramakrishna runs in and pockets this with a big dive

dismissalText.commentary: Naman Dhir c sub (SN Khan) b Overton 57 (37b 4x4 3x6 86m) SR: 154.05

dismissalComment.html: Sarfaraz brings out the slider at cover. Ran left, took it with a jump and fell across while ensuring the wrist was above the ground. Dhir yelled as the catch was completed. Slower 123ks ball was full at the stumps, Dhir made room and looked to go inside out

dismissalText.commentary: Suryakumar Yadav c Brevis b Ghosh 21 (12b 3x4 1x6 22m) SR: 175

dismissalComment.html: Jaffa in T20verse. More importantly, it's Ghosh's first IPL wicket. 133ks halfway down and outside off, may not have been as wide as SKY wanted as he went for the lofted cut. Yanked the back leg up while hitting from around rib-height, found deep point to perfection. Brevis, the fielder, was standing well in too

dismissalText.commentary: Tilak Varma c Gaikwad b Noor Ahmad 5 (8b 0x4 0x6 14m) SR: 62.5

dismissalComment.html: Miscommunication at cover but catch is taken! Gaikwad called for it going to the right at cover, Urvil didn't hear and kept going in his direction. Nearly shoulder-barged the skipper but Gaikwad turned to the right and took it nicely. Was a legbreak on a length just outside off, Tilak was beside the ball and went for the slog sweep. Got a top edge

dismissalText.commentary: Hardik Pandya c Brevis b Kamboj 18 (23b 2x4 0x6 39m) SR: 78.26

dismissalComment.html: Hardik's misery ends. Looked like he timed it well for a change but it's taken well inside the deep-midwicket boundary. 137ks slot ball angling in at the stumps. Hardik was standing at an angle and was behind it too, went for the lofted on-drive and held the pose instead of following through fully.

dismissalText.commentary: Will Jacks c Ghosh b Kamboj 1 (5b 0x4 0x6 6m) SR: 20

dismissalComment.html: Absolute stunner from Ramakrishna! This was on a length and outside off. Jacks, looking to force the issue, runs down and hoicks a lofted drive in the air. Grabs the bottom edge of the bat and it flies towards deep point. Ramakrishna runs in and pockets this with a big dive

dismissalComment.html: Jaffa in T20verse. More importantly, it's Ghosh's first IPL wicket. 133ks halfway down and outside off, may not have been as wide as SKY wanted as he went for the lofted cut. Yanked the back leg up while hitting from around rib-height, found deep point to perfection. Brevis, the fielder, was standing well in too

dismissalText.commentary: Tilak Varma c Gaikwad b Noor Ahmad 5 (8b 0x4 0x6 14m) SR: 62.5

dismissalComment.html: Miscommunication at cover but catch is taken! Gaikwad called for it going to the right at cover, Urvil didn't hear and kept going in his direction. Nearly shoulder-barged the skipper but Gaikwad turned to the right and took it nicely. Was a legbreak on a length just outside off, Tilak was beside the ball and went for the slog sweep. Got a top edge
